name: ticktick
title: TickTick
description: Unofficial community extension for TickTick — tasks, projects, tags, habits, pomodoro, smart lists, and more. Requires your own OAuth app from developer.ticktick.com.
author: ysrazsingh

preferences.name: enableAlerts
preferences.title: Enable Alerts
preferences.description: Show overdue/urgent task alerts in the menu bar and background checks
preferences.label: Enable

preferences.name: alertOverdue
preferences.title: Alert Overdue Tasks
preferences.description: Notify when tasks are past their due date
preferences.label: Enable

commands.name: next7days
commands.title: Next 7 Days
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: View upcoming tasks for the next 7 days

commands.name: eisenhower
commands.title: Eisenhower Matrix
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: View tasks by urgency and importance

commands.name: habits
commands.title: Habits
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: Track and check in your habits

commands.name: quick-add
commands.title: Quick Add Task
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: Quickly add a task to TickTick

commands.name: filters
commands.title: Smart Lists
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: View tasks from your TickTick smart lists / filters

commands.name: manage-projects
commands.title: Manage Projects
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: Create, rename, archive, or delete projects

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: TickTick status in your menu bar — timer, overdue count, quick actions

commands.name: background-check
commands.title: Background Alerts
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: Checks for overdue tasks and pomodoro completion in the background

commands.name: logout
commands.title: Disconnect TickTick Account
commands.subtitle: TickTick
commands.description: Remove stored OAuth tokens and re-authenticate

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
